title: IKTSY or FDS: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Business - Information Services sector might want to consider either INTERTEK GP (IKTSY) or FactSet Research (FDS). But which of these two stocks presents investors with the better value opportunity right now?

title: Reasons Why You Should Retain FactSet Research (FDS) Stock
text: FactSet (FDS) gains from its global presence while returning value to shareholders. Integration risks remain a concern.

title: FactSet Schedules First Quarter 2024 Earnings Call
text: NORWALK, Conn., Nov. 16, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FactSet (NYSE: FDS | NASDAQ: FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, announced today that it will release its financial and operating results for the first quarter fiscal 2024, ending November 30, 2023, on Tuesday, December 19, 2023. FactSet will also host a conference call to discuss these results at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, December 19, 2023.

title: FactSet Declares Dividend
text: NORWALK, Conn., Nov. 02, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FactSet (NYSE: FDS | NASDAQ: FDS), a global financial digital platform and enterprise solutions provider, today announced that its Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.98 per share.
